title: Sumerian/Akkadian: Lament for Uruk
description: From the Sumerian/Akkadian corpus: Lament for Uruk.
introduction: From the Sumerian/Akkadian corpus: Lament for Uruk.

translation.text: From 'Lament for Uruk': One of the 117 major literary works of ancient Mesopotamia, recorded on clay tablets in cuneiform script and preserved in the great libraries of Sumer, Akkad, Babylon, and Assyria.
